502 TRBLE_CNCNTRTN_FREQ_ADMSN_CD TRBLE_CNCNTRTN_FREQ_ADMSN_CD Mood: Trouble concentrating on things: F (A) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of admission, the frequency with which the patient has trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television. 0 = Never or 1 day 
1 = 2-6 days 
2 = 7-11 days 
3 = 12-14 days 
-
